---
title: "RoBMA"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{robma}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

## Introduction

RoBMA (Robust Bayesian Meta-Analysis) performs model averaging
across multiple bias-adjusted meta-analysis models.

Instead of choosing a single model, RoBMA averages posterior
distributions weighted by model probabilities.

\[
p(\theta|y) =
\sum_k p(\theta|y, M_k) p(M_k|y)
\]

This approach integrates uncertainty about publication bias
and model specification.
